message:
🌱 Add spin: Plugin upgrades mission (#844)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "spin-1543-plugin-upgrades",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "spin: Plugin upgrades",
+    "description": "Plugin upgrades. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify spin upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your spin installation:\n```bash\nspin version\nspin status 2>&1 | head -20\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review spin configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant spin configuration:\nThis is a micro-SIP for informing Spin users when there are new versions of their favourite plugins.  It is for discussion.\n\n**Principles:**\n\n* Do not break the user's existing workflow (habits, scripts, etc.)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Plugin upgrades",
+        "description": "WIP draft to move Fermyon Cloud command code (`spin cloud deploy` and `spin cloud login`) out of Spin CLI and into a plugin. \n\n[SIP](https://github.com/kate-goldenring/spin/blob/cloud-plugin-porting/docs/content/sips/014-cloud-plugin.md).\n\nCloud plugin: https://github.com/fermyon/cloud-plugin\n\n~Do not merge until the plugin is added to the [Spin plugins registry](https://github.com/fermyon/spin-plugins).~ Added"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Plugin upgrades is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest spin to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "WIP draft to move Fermyon Cloud command code (`spin cloud deploy` and `spin cloud login`) out of Spin CLI and into a plugin. \n\n[SIP](https://github.com/kate-goldenring/spin/blob/cloud-plugin-porting/docs/content/sips/014-cloud-plugin.md).",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
